_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld

goal.description:
Mend The Broken Shield/Sword: is a mcguffin goal where you have to find broken shards to mend the broken shield/sword. 
 This goal is meant to be played after beating the champion. This goal auto includes Wandersanity. 
 Type Researcher Goal: Is to research all types onces, this goal includes Routesanity and Typesanity

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage
